headline: Simonsen wins Trust Forsikring Championship by two points
blurb: Martin Leth Simonsen added another Stableford win to his strong 2026 season, finishing two points clear of Jesper Sandborg at Lyngbygaard Golf Klub.
body:
[Martin Leth Simonsen](/martin-leth-simonsen) won the Trust Forsikring Championship at Lyngbygaard Golf Klub, finishing on +14 Stableford points — two points ahead of [Jesper Sandborg](/jesper-sandborg), who came in at +12. The event, played from May 27–29, used the Stableford format.

Local player [Bjørn La Cour Søborg](/bjorn-la-cour-soborg) and Swedish [Anton Karlsson](/anton-karlsson) shared third place on +11 points, while [Jesper Hagborg Asp](/jesper-hagborg-asp) finished fifth on +10. The win was comfortable enough for Simonsen, who kept a steady lead over the final round.

Two very low gross rounds stood out during the tournament. [Albin Tidén](/albin-tiden) shot a 60 in the second round, and [Erik Fogel](/erik-fogel) followed close behind with a 61 in the same round. Out of 72 players in the field, 31 made the cut at −16.

Simonsen has been the strongest player on tour this season. He also won the Big Green Egg Blekinge Open earlier in May and the INFINITUM ECCO Masters before that, plus a third-place finish at the Sand Valley Masters. Sandborg, who won last week's Fjällbacka Open, could not keep up this time but still had a strong result in second place.
